title: eucommia ulmoides
intro: Eucommia ulmoides, also known as Du Zhong, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China that belongs to the family Eucommiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Eucommia ulmoides include improving cardiovascular health, reducing blood pressure, and strengthening the bones, as well as possessing anti-aging and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, Eucommia ulmoides is often used in the form of dried bark, powder, or decoction, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
